channel.title: Hardlife Apparel Company LTD
channel.description: Philadelphia streetwear since 2006. Hoodies, tees, longsleeves, and accessories.

item.title: Human Beings - Black Hoodie
item.description: Heavyweight fleece hoodie with Human Beings graphic print on premium cotton-poly blend. Relaxed unisex fit with ribbed cuffs and kangaroo pocket. From HRDLF — Philadelphia streetwear since 2006. Limited production run, not restocked once sold out.
